items.title: Iran's high-risk war strategy seems to centre on endurance and deterrence
items.dek: Tehran's approach appears to rest on a belief it can absorb strikes longer than its adversaries sustain pain and costs, writes BBC Persian's Amir Azimi.
items.body: Tehran's approach appears to rest on a belief it can absorb strikes longer than its adversaries sustain pain and costs, writes BBC Persian's Amir Azimi.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli evacuation order for Beirut's southern suburbs sparks panic
items.dek: Huge traffic jams form after the unprecedented warning for people to leave the Hezbollah stronghold, as Israel steps up its strikes across Lebanon.
items.body: Huge traffic jams form after the unprecedented warning for people to leave the Hezbollah stronghold, as Israel steps up its strikes across Lebanon.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US asked Ukraine for help fighting Iranian drones, Zelensky says
items.dek: Ukraine's president says Kyiv will only help if doing so does not deplete its own air defences.
items.body: Ukraine's president says Kyiv will only help if doing so does not deplete its own air defences.
items.author: IriLine Desk
